## Explore entire user journeys with flows.

Videos

Experience flows the way they were meant to be experienced, complete with transitions, micro-interactions, and animations.

Prototype mode

Walk through flows, step by step, by using the interactive hotspots at your own preferred pace.

## From inspiration to creation.

Copy to Figma

Download designs you like or copy it straight into Figma with our new [Figma plugin](https://www.figma.com/community/plugin/1332649462188834894/mobbin).

Save to collections

Collect your favorite designs and upload your own screenshots into one place.

Leave comments

Take notes upon saving so you’ll never forget the context in the future.

Meng To

DesignCode

> Mobbin is a game-changer for designers looking to step up their understanding of UX and UI design patterns. It’s so massive, meticulously organized, has deep user flows and even a figma plugin! It’s indispensable in the modern designer’s toolbox.

> All my homies love Mobbin. I mean that. I finally deleted that folder of 1,866 unorganized screenshots and haven’t looked back since. Shoutout to Jiho and the team for doing God’s work.

![Avatar of Rachel How](https://mobbin.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Frachel.2f387582.jpeg&w=1920&q=75&dpl=dpl_2drB7VCLvjJzcfdM6cqkRHjBKW4e)

Rachel How

> Mobbin is my go-to reference for app & web design. Apart from saving countless hours, it gives me insights on the design patterns, copywriting, and user flows of world-class products. A must-have for creative inspiration and efficiency!

![Avatar of Daryl Ginn](https://mobbin.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fdaryl.d4d57329.png&w=1920&q=75&dpl=dpl_2drB7VCLvjJzcfdM6cqkRHjBKW4e)

![Endless logo](https://mobbin.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fendless.03c95ba0.png&w=384&q=75&dpl=dpl_2drB7VCLvjJzcfdM6cqkRHjBKW4e)

Daryl Ginn

Endless

> Mobbin has quickly become our favourite inspiration resource for designing mobile apps at endless.design, their advanced filtering is unmatched in the inspiration space.

![Avatar of Axel Lindmarker](https://mobbin.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Faxel.3f8e9fd4.png&w=1920&q=75&dpl=dpl_2drB7VCLvjJzcfdM6cqkRHjBKW4e)

![Light logo](https://mobbin.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Flight.eb251e55.png&w=1920&q=75&dpl=dpl_2drB7VCLvjJzcfdM6cqkRHjBKW4e)

Axel Lindmarker

Light

> Mobbin is one of my main tools for finding flows to gain UX and UI insights from. Going there saves me a lot of time from having to do it myself.

![Avatar of Bobby Giangeruso](https://mobbin.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fbobby.82185c42.png&w=1920&q=75&dpl=dpl_2drB7VCLvjJzcfdM6cqkRHjBKW4e)

![Heart Hands, Inc logo](https://mobbin.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fhearthands.7bcc3ec3.png&w=256&q=75&dpl=dpl_2drB7VCLvjJzcfdM6cqkRHjBKW4e)

Bobby Giangeruso

Heart Hands, Inc

> Mobbin is one of those tabs I never close. It’s the largest up-to-date library of app screens.

## Never run out of inspiration again.

Use Mobbin for free as long as you like or get full access with any of our paid plans.

[Join for free](https://mobbin.com/signup) [See our plans](https://mobbin.com/pricing)

buttonSecondary.shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, oklab(0.37054 0.0000169128 0.00000742078 / 0.16) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset

__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #1 because it is located in the header, matches the brand name 'Mobbin', and links to the homepage. Although it is not visible, it is the most appropriate choice based on metadata.

primary.reasoning: Button #0 ('Join for free') has a dark background (#141414) which stands out against the light background, making it the primary CTA. The text is action-oriented, encouraging users to join.

secondary.reasoning: Button #1 ('See our plans') has a light background (#FFFFFF) and serves as a secondary action, providing additional information without the same emphasis as the primary button.

rawLogoSelection.selectedLogoReasoning: Selected #1 because it is located in the header, matches the brand name 'Mobbin', and links to the homepage. Although it is not visible, it is the most appropriate choice based on metadata.

Discover real-world design inspiration.

Featuring over 1,000 iOS & Web apps, and 400 sites —
New content weekly.

Join for free
See our plans

Trusted by design teams at

A growing library of
1,712 apps
592,400 screens
136,300 flows

Find design patterns in seconds.

Explore entire user journeys with flows.

From inspiration to creation.

What our users are saying.

Never run out of inspiration again.

Use Mobbin for free as long as you like or get full access with any of our paid plans.
